User.title: User
User.description: User profile with configuration, settings and metadata.

title.description: Title or status flag of the user.

remindersEnabled.description: Whether recurring push notes are active.

reminderIntervalHours.description: User custom hour interval alert setup.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the profile was generated.

LogEntry.title: LogEntry
LogEntry.description: Mind tracking log indicating mood, energy, fear, resistance, standard and custom activities.

/users/{userId}.description: Document containing user-specific profiles, triggers, settings and configurations.

/users/{userId}/logs/{logId}.description: Sub-collection preserving chronological list of logs registered by the authenticated user.
